stages.label: anticipation
stages.keyPose: weight settle + left arm cross + eye lock

stages.label: charge
stages.keyPose: left hand gathers aura + right hand spear-ready

stages.label: recover
stages.keyPose: return pose + cape settle + shadow anchor

stages.label: telegraph
stages.keyPose: left hand command sigil summon + mouth open command

stages.label: strike
stages.keyPose: sweep slash + torso arc + head snap

stages.label: settle
stages.keyPose: pose hold with exposed silhouette edges

stages.label: summon
stages.keyPose: shadow cloak expands + first strike load

stages.label: throne
stages.keyPose: static command throne pose + staff rise

stages.label: collapse
stages.keyPose: forward crash + armor echo + floor impact
